description.abstract: Test using $I to include a file from the parent directory.
description.detailed: E.g. mORMot uses this, to include mormot.defines.inc, all along sources.

description.abstract: Include file using Windows backslashes, to make test harder.
description.detailed: Should work cross-platform, FPC allows this even on Linux too.
This is easier test, since / work also on Windos as path separator out-of-the-box.
